case_title: GOLDEN GATEWAY CENTER, A CALIF LTD PARTNERSHIP vs. THURBER, MICHAEL G. et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOLDEN GATEWAY CENTER, A CALIF LTD PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THURBER, MICHAEL G. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: [PREMISES VACATED ON 20-MAR-95] $6,591.60 RENT, $300.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $179.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,071.10, LEASE FORFEITED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOLDEN GATEWAY CENTER, A CALIF LTD PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT THURBER, MICHAEL G. DOES 1 THROUGH 5 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,
